# Demo: Publishing News with an Image

This is a complete demonstration of the image-based News workflow. On the homepage, the entry shows its publication date, title, and image. Selecting any part of the entry opens this detail page.

## What the Homepage Uses

The homepage card is generated from the front matter at the top of this Markdown file:

- `date` controls the displayed publication date and ordering.
- `title` appears on the homepage and detail page.
- `description` becomes the detail-page summary.
- `image` points to the image stored under `assets/images/news/`.
- `imageAlt` provides an accessible description of the image.

## Publishing Another News Item

1. Add an image to `assets/images/news/`.
2. Run `python3 scripts/content.py new-news` with the new metadata.
3. Edit the generated Markdown file under `content/news/`.
4. Run `python3 scripts/content.py sync` after editing.
5. Run `python3 scripts/content.py check` before publishing.

The generated JSON files are committed with the Markdown and image, so GitHub Pages can serve everything directly without a build step.
